summary: Live PR inventory shard classified independently. No shared canonical was selected. No close, merge, fix, or PR-opening action is available or safe under this job. One linked security-sensitive issue is routed to central security triage; open PRs remain blocked on maintainer/proof/technical-review decisions.

actions.reason: Exact linked issue is security-sensitive and belongs in central OpenClaw security handling, not backlog-cleanup automation.
Closed context refs are evidence only and must not receive close actions.
#87889 remains the live canonical issue for the Dashboard update handoff subfamily.
Maintainer-owned draft feature PR requires maintainer decision; this inventory job cannot merge or repair it.
Proof sufficiency and merge-readiness need maintainer judgment; this job cannot merge, fix, or close it.
Focused green bug-fix PR requires maintainer technical correctness review; no merge action is allowed in this job.
Active maintainer follow-up and unresolved bot review blockers require maintainer/author action; this job cannot repair or close it.
The candidate is tied to a live issue but remains proof-blocked; deciding whether mock-only proof is acceptable requires maintainer judgment.
Linked maintainer draft PR has an unresolved review blocker and non-main base; keep it for maintainer follow-up rather than closing or treating it as canonical here.

needs_human: #88181: maintainer-owned draft feature PR needs maintainer decision before any merge path.
#88193: draft Telegram PR has later screenshot proof, but proof sufficiency and readiness remain maintainer decisions.
#88206: green focused contributor bug-fix PR needs maintainer technical correctness review; merge is blocked by job frontmatter.
#88212: maintainer-owned draft has active maintainer follow-up plus actionable ClawSweeper/Copilot blockers.
#88224: focused #87889 fix has failing Real behavior proof; maintainer must decide proof/next-step sufficiency.
#88789: linked maintainer-owned draft has an unresolved review blocker and non-main base.
